description: You are a logistics automation engineer configuring a simulation for an autonomous warehouse 'tugger train'. Mechanically link the TUGGER_ROBOT and MATERIAL_CART by setting the robot's HingeJoint endPoint to a SolidReference named 'MATERIAL_CART'. Configure the hitch joint parameters with an axis of 0 0 1, an anchor at -1.2 0 0.15, and a dampingConstant of 2.5. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/tugger_linked.wbt.
